name: sessions/16994837303056291039
title: Resolve Non-Golden Test Failures and Environment Issues
prompt:
Working in the repo root (MasumRab/kaggle-notebooks-analysis):

Install dependencies first:
  pip install -e tools/kaggle-qa-toolkit
  pip install -e tools/kaggle_forensics
  pip install -r envs/requirements-dev.txt 2>/dev/null || pip install pytest nbqa ruff

Run the full test suite, excluding tests marked "golden" (those need real data):
  python -m pytest scripts/tests/ -v -m "not golden" --tb=short 2>&1 | tee test_output.txt

Triage the results into three buckets:
  PASS   — no action needed
  SKIP   — note why (missing fixture, data dependency)
  FAIL   — fix if the fix does not require competition data

Known tests that should pass without data:
  - test_notebook_triage.py    (pure unit tests, no I/O)
  - test_security.py           (mocked, no I/O)
  - test_house_prices_golden.py  (non-golden class only: TestSubmissionSchema, TestPipelineStructure)
  - test_lanl_golden.py          (non-golden class only)

Fix all FAIL cases that are fixable without data. Do not mock out real behaviour —
only fix genuine bugs (import errors, wrong paths, missing fixtures).

After all fixes pass, commit:
  git add scripts/tests/ scripts/
  git commit -m "fix: test suite — resolve import errors and path bugs (non-golden tests)"
